title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on the macroeconomic implications of advanced AI, discussing optimal taxation and wealth redistribution, capital versus labor share, and strategies for countries outside the AI supply chain.
